title: Thalaiyar Falls
tagline: Thalaiyar Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thalaiyar Falls, also known as Rat Tail Falls is a waterfall in Dindigul District, located on the Manjalar River, one of the tributaries of Vaigai river which flows in the south of
overview.description: Thalaiyar Falls, also known as Rat Tail Falls is a waterfall in Dindigul District, located on the Manjalar River, one of the tributaries of Vaigai river which flows in the south of Tamil Nadu State, South India. It is 297 m (974 ft) tall and is the highest waterfall in Tamil Nadu, the eighth highest waterfall in India and the 267th highest in the world.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Manjalar Dam
topPlaces.description: The Manjalar Dam is a dam across the Manjalar River in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Across the river at around 6 kilometres (4 mi) from Devadhanapatti bus stand.

topPlaces.name: Pannaikadu
topPlaces.description: Pannaikadu is a panchayat town in Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kumbakkarai Falls
topPlaces.description: Kumbakkarai Falls are lesser known falls in the foothills of the Kodaikanal Hills. They are located at 10°10′48″N 77°31′50″E in Theni district, 9 kilometers (5.6 mi) from Periyakulam.

topPlaces.name: Perumal Peak
topPlaces.description: Perumal Peak or Perumal Malai Peak is a high peak at Kodaikanal in the Palani hills, that are a part of the greater Western Ghat mountain range in Tamil Nadu, India, having an elevation of 2,234 metres (7,329 ft). It is a favourite spot for trekkers.

topPlaces.name: Silver Cascade Falls (India)
topPlaces.description: Silver Cascade Falls is a waterfall located in Kodaikanal, Dindigul district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: The Manjalar Dam is a dam across the Manjalar River in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Across the river at around 6 kilometres (4 mi) from Devadhanapatti bus stand.
Pannaikadu is a panchayat town in Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Kumbakkarai Falls are lesser known falls in the foothills of the Kodaikanal Hills. They are located at 10°10′48″N 77°31′50″E in Theni district, 9 kilometers (5.6 mi) from Periyakulam.

Perumal Peak or Perumal Malai Peak is a high peak at Kodaikanal in the Palani hills, that are a part of the greater Western Ghat mountain range in Tamil Nadu, India, having an elevation of 2,234 metres (7,329 ft). It is a favourite spot for trekkers.
Silver Cascade Falls is a waterfall located in Kodaikanal, Dindigul district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thalaiyar Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thalaiyar Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thalaiyar Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thalaiyar Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thalaiyar Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thalaiyar Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Thalaiyar Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thalaiyar Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manjalar Dam, Pannaikadu, Kumbakkarai Falls, Perumal Peak, Silver Cascade Falls (India).
